text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Travel Immunizations 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTERS FOR DISEASE CONTROL AND PREVENTION TRAVELERS' HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on travel vaccinations and includes a searchable map of authorized yellow fever centers. 1600 Clifton Road Atlanta, GA 30329 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (800) 232-4636 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childhood immunizations, COVID-19, HPV, and travel immunizations. Influenza (flu) vaccines are provided as they become available each season, along with vaccine information. 140 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Unrestricted, and the HPV9 immunization for 9 y/o to 45 y/o Hours: Monday-Friday 9-11am and 1 to 4pm Email (541) 774-8209 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION
